message:
feat: Add proper C extension detection for third-party packages

- isCExtension now recursively scans package directories for .so/.dylib/.pyd files
- Detect packages like numpy that contain C extensions in subdirectories
- Check C extensions BEFORE isLocalModule to prevent treating site-packages as local
- Track import aliases (e.g., np -> numpy) and mark both as skipped
- Emit clear @compileError when C extension module is used

Third-party packages with C extensions now fail gracefully with a message
directing users to implement ctypes/cffi.
